description: Trust tiers for validation signals. Tiers are assigned here by human review, never by the agent producing the receipt. Missing entries resolve to 'unknown'. Tier meanings: test_backed = the validator itself has passing tests covering its critical failure mode; structural_only = the validator runs and checks structure but its own behavior is untested; self_reported = the signal is an agent or tool self-claim with no independent check; unknown = not registered.
review_note: Re-tier an entry whenever the named validator changes behavior; since_version records the validator version the tier was assessed against.

pytest_suite.rationale: The framework's own pytest suite (3,200+ tests) is executed and its exit code is machine-observed.

runtime_governance_check.rationale: Runtime governance entrypoint checks structure and wiring; its own critical-failure coverage is partial.
